title: Automated Scan-to-BIM Method for City-Scale Building Roof Reconstruction Using UAV Photogrammetry and Geospatial Building Footprints

title: A Survey-Controlled Photogrammetric Framework for Consistent Multi-Floor Geometry Estimation in Robotic Facade Installation

title: An Automatic Update Framework for As-designed Pipeline BIM Model Based on Laser Scanning Point Cloud

title: LLM-Based BIM-DfS Framework for Phase-Specific Safety Mitigation Recommendations during the Design Stage

title: Development and Implementation of an OpenBIM-LCA Workflow for Factory Planning

title: Robot assisted selective disassembly for buildings

title: BIM-based Hybrid Knowledge Graph based on DSL for Computational Design Rule Formalization

title: Bridging Building Information Modelling and Natural Language Processing: A Systematic Review on Current Applications and Limitations

title: Neural Implicit Representations for IFC Objects: A Coordinate-Preserving Approach for Volumetric Spatial Reasoning

title: RAG-LLM-Enhanced BIM for Automated Fall Hazard Detection and Prevention

title: LLM-based Exploration of BIM Clash Information using Semantic Knowledge Graph

title: As-is Modelling of Deformed Linear Objects from 3D Point Clouds using Inverse Kinematics -based Iterative Closest Point

title: An Automated Decision Support System for Pre-planning of Precast Bridge Installation using Heuristic-Based Simulation and Invariant Signatures

title: Cognitive Scan-to-BIM: LLM-Driven Hyperparameter Optimization for Robust MEP Primitive Fitting in Complex Construction Environments

title: Terrain-aware BIM Construction Planning for PrefabricatedBuildings in Complex Mountainous Sites: Method and SimulationValidation

title: A Comparative Study of Mobile Device and Terrestrial Laser Scanning-Based Scan-to-BIM Workflows

title: Four-Dimensional Fire Safety Knowledge-Enhanced Large Language Model for BIM Compliance Checking

title: An Algorithmic Framework for the Automated Synchronization of Multi-Domain BIM Representations via Canonical Clustering

title: Industrial3D: A Large-Scale Industrial MEP Point Cloud Dataset and Benchmark for Complex Industrial Scene Understanding

title: A proof-of-concept framework for LLM-augmented semantic web technologies for knowledge sharing and reuse in construction

title: Automating Electrical Outlet and Circuit Assignment in BIM through AI-Assisted CAD-BIM Interoperability

title: Artificial Intelligence for Design for Safety in Construction: A Critical Review and Research Agenda

title: The project of Messina-Catania Railway Line, Taormina-Giampilieri Lot

title: BIM-Integrated AR for MEP field inspection: A Multi-modal Approach

title: Lean-digital-place integration for circular housing design

title: High-Precision Optimization of BIM-3D GIS Models for Digital Twins: A Case Study of Santun River Basin

ai_summary_zh: 针对BIM与3D GIS模型集成中数据量大、渲染延迟的问题，以IFC为基模型、OSGB为目标模型，提出包含几何优化、LOD层级映射和坐标配准的三步框架。在桑屯河流域数字孪生项目中，AW-QEM算法使平均加载时间降低15%，同时保持97%的几何精度。

title: AI-POWERED DIGITAL SPATIAL INTELLIGENCE: CONVERTING BIM AND DIGITAL TWINS INTO OPERATIONAL INSIGHT, SUSTAINABILITY, AND PROFIT IN AEC
venue: International Research Journal of Modernization in Engineering Technology and Science

ai_summary_zh: 本研究采用混合方法，结合访谈、材料分析与行业案例，探讨人工智能驱动的数字空间智能如何将建筑信息模型与物联网分析相结合，将静态三维模型转化为建筑全生命周期的动态运营洞察。案例结果表明，该方法实现了暖通空调能耗降低15%、维护成本下降18-25%及变更单减少32%的显著效益。

title: Energy consumption optimization and self-powered environmental monitoring design for low-carbon smart buildings

ai_summary_zh: 通过案例分析与BIM能耗模拟、材料优化及光伏系统集成，研究将传统建筑改造为低碳智能建筑的方法。结果显示，该方法使年能耗降低40.68%，照明能耗减少36.59%，屋顶光伏系统在7.46年内回收成本，并自主为环境传感器供电。
